sections.markdown:
- Activity: Sun Funny Run
- Started: 2025-07-06 10:44
- Distance: 16 km
- Moving time: 1:27:04
- Elapsed time: 1:27:08
- Elevation gain: 95.6 m
- Average heart rate: 172 bpm
- Max heart rate: 186 bpm
- Average watts: 209.8 W
- Average speed: 11 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `5` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `172.3 bpm`, ranging from `155.3` to `179.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `167.9 bpm` and second-half average HR was `178.9 bpm` (+11.0 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `175.5 spm`, with a working range of `143.4` to `179.7 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `177.4 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `172.5 spm` (-4.9 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:26 /km` across `16.014 km` in `1:27:04` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:24 /km` and second-half pace was `5:29 /km` (+5 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `172.0 bpm` average and `186 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `165.5 bpm` in the first half and `178.7 bpm` in the second (+13.2 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:27:04` out of `1:27:08` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `2` stop segments and `0.2%` stationary samples, so the run stayed very continuous.

- Strava logged about `146.8 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.4 m` and `17.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `79.2 m` in the first half and `67.6 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
